ttd_problem: TTD model predicts low TTD for ALL shots (100% det, 100% FA). The model cannot learn the mapping from 78 0D features to continuous TTD on 255 shots. Binary classification (disruption yes/no) is an easier target than regression (exactly how many ms until crash).
note: Seed 0 recovery filter gave 43% det @ 17% FA — below average (usual ~63% @ 33%). This is normal seed variance.
conclusion: TTD regression requires more data than binary classification. With 83 disrupted shots providing TTD labels, the regression target has too little signal. Binary GRU + recovery filter remains the best approach on 255 MAST shots.
